title: Rich Baked Egg
description: A simple yet satisfying breakfast dish featuring a rich egg baked in a crispy, flaky crust. Perfect for a cozy morning.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and place in a pie dish.
In a bowl, whisk the egg and crumbled bacon together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the egg is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
